web.title: Moralis Pricing | Blockchain & Onchain Data API Plans
web.description: COMPARE OUR PRICING PLANS. Find out what works best for you and your team. Crypto API Pricing Plans, Free Free to get started Get Started, Starter $49 per month ...
web.markdown:
Grow and scale with Moralis # Plans built for everyone Scale your Web3 project with our flexible blockchain API pricing plans. Cost-effective crypto, NFT, and token APIs for all your needs. MONTHLYANNUAL UP TO 30% OFF FreeStarterProBusiness ## Free For developers that are just getting started FREE [Get Started](https://admin.moralis.com/account/billing) ### Access to: - 40,000 Compute Units per day - Access to all networks - Access to RPC nodes - ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/walletIcon.svg) Wallet API - ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/tokenIcon.svg) Token API - ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/nftIcon.svg) NFT API - ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/priceAPI.svg) Price API - ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/defiIcon.svg) DeFi API - ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Blockchain-API-Icon.svg) Blockchain API - ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/Stream-Logo.svg) Streams API - ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Moralis-Cortex-Icon.svg) Cortex API [More about the Free Plan](https://moralis.com/pricing/#pricingContainer) ## Starter For small teams working with crypto data $49 per month, billed annually $120 SAVED [Get Started](https://admin.moralis.com/payments/checkout/starter-plan?isMonthly=false) ### Everything in Free, plus: - 2 million Compute Units per month - 1,000 CU/s throughput - 5 RPC nodes [More about the Starter Plan](https://moralis.com/pricing/#pricingContainer) ## Pro For professional teams and growing apps $199 per month, billed annually $600 SAVED [Get Started](https://admin.moralis.com/payments/checkout/pro-plan?isMonthly=false) ### Everything in Starter, plus: - 100 million Compute Units per month - 2,000 CU/s throughput - 20 RPC nodes - Premium endpoints - Priority queue for NFT sync - Slack / Telegram channel - Pay in crypto with annual plan [More about the Pro Plan](https://moralis.com/pricing/#pricingContainer) ## Business For those needing performance and scale $490 per month, billed annually $3,108 SAVED [Get Started](https://admin.moralis.com/payments/checkout/business-plan?isMonthly=false) ### Everything in Pro, plus: - 500 million Compute Units per month - 5,000 CU/s throughput - Unlimited RPC nodes - Larger API payloads - Pay in crypto [More about the Business Plan](https://moralis.com/pricing/#pricingContainer) ## Enterprise Contact us to find a custom solution for your business [Contact Us](https://moralis.com/pricing/#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dpopup%3Aopen%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6IjEzNDM2NyIsInRvZ2dsZSI6ZmFsc2V9) ### Everything in Business, plus: - Custom throughput limits - 24/7 access to engineering teams - 24/7 support and monitoring - Early access to new features - Committed use discounts - Marketing support - Faster metadata refreshes [More about the Enterprise Plan](https://moralis.com/pricing/#pricingContainer) ## Usage Calculator Not sure which plan fits? Enter your expected API usage and we’ll help estimate your CU needs and suggest a matching plan. Please note this is a rough estimate, not a formal quote. Monthly API Requests500K Requests per Second50 RPS Based on an average of **72 CUs** per API request. 36M CUs 1,100 CUs/second Recommended plan Pro Plan$199/monthbilled annually Get Started Customize Average CUs: 72 Average CUs throughput: 22 Select the endpoints you plan to use to get a more accurate estimate of your average CU usage per request. - getWalletHistory - getWalletTransactions - getWalletNetworth - getWalletActiveChains - getWalletApprovals - getNativeBalance - getWalletTokenBalancesPrice - getWalletAddressTransfers - getSwapsByWallet - getWalletNFTs - getTokenHolders - getTokenMetadata - getTokenAddressTransfers - getSwapsByToken - searchTokens - getTokenAnalytics - getMultipleTokenAnalytics - getFilteredTokens - getTrendingTokens - getTopGainersTokens - getTopLosersTokens - getTokenPairs - getPairCandlesticks - getNFTTrades - getNFTMetadata - getUniqueOwnersByCollection - getTokenIdOwners - getNFTTransfers - getNFTFloorPriceByContract - getNFTHistoricalFloorPriceByContract - getTokenPrice - getMultipleTokenPrices - getDefiSummary - getDefiPositionsSummary - getDefiPositionsByProtocol ### Need a custom quote? Can’t find your endpoints above? Reach out to our sales team - we’ll put together a custom quote for you. [Contacts Sales](https://moralis.com/pricing/#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dpopup%3Aopen%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6IjEzNDM2NyIsInRvZ2dsZSI6ZmFsc2V9) [View all 80+ endpoints](https://docs.moralis.com/web3-data-api/evm/reference) ## COMPARE OUR PRICING PLANS Find out what works best for you and your team | Crypto API Pricing Plans | **Free** Free to get started [Get Started](https://admin.moralis.com/account/billing) | **Starter**
$49 per month, billed annually[Get Started](https://admin.moralis.com/payments/checkout/starter-plan?isMonthly=false) | **Pro**
$199 per month, billed annually[Get Started](https://admin.moralis.com/payments/checkout/pro-plan?isMonthly=false) | **Business**
$490 per month, billed annually[Get Started](https://admin.moralis.com/payments/checkout/business-plan?isMonthly=false) | **Enterprise** Custom Pricing [Contact Us](https://moralis.com/pricing/#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dpopup%3Aopen%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6IjEzNDM2NyIsInRvZ2dsZSI6ZmFsc2V9) | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | **Usage** (CUs) | | | Compute Units included | 40,000per day | 2,000,000per month | 100,000,000per month | 500,000,000per month | Custom | | API throughput (CU/s) | 1,000 | 1,000 | 2,000 | 5,000 | Custom | | API maximum payload size EVM only | 100 | 100 | 100 | 300 | 5,000+ | | NFT metadata refresh | No | No | Yes | Priority Queue | First Priority | | **RPC Nodes** | | | Number of nodes | 2 | 2 | 20 | Unlimited | Unlimited | | RPC node throughput (CU/s) | 100 | 100 | 100 | 300 | Unlimited | | Full archive data | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | | **Moralis Streams** | | | Number of auto retries | No | 2 | 2 | 5 | Custom | | Failed payload retention time | No | 6 hours | 6 hours | 1 week | Custom | | **Products** | | | RPC Nodes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | | ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/walletIcon.svg)
Wallet API | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | | ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/tokenIcon.svg)
Token API | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | | ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/nftIcon.svg)
NFT API | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | | ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/priceAPI.svg)
Price API | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | | ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/defiIcon.svg)
DeFi API | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | | ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Blockchain-API-Icon.svg)
Blockchain API | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | | ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/Stream-Logo.svg)
Streams API | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | | ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Moralis-Cortex-Icon.svg)
Cortex API | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | | Premium endpoints | No | No | Yes | Yes | Yes | | Crypto price widget | No | No | With Branding | Without Branding | Without Branding | | **Support** | | | Discord and email support | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | | 24/7 engineering team access | No | No | No | No | Yes | | Custom SLA | No | No | No | No | Yes | | Slack/Telegram channel | No | No | Yes | Yes | Yes | | **Other** | | | Cost of additional CUs | N/A | $11.25per million | $5per million | $4per million | | | Blockchain networks | All | All | All | All | All +
customer networks | | Pay in crypto | No | No | Yes | Yes | Yes | | Attribution required | Yes | Yes | Yes | No | No | ## Take it from our customers ### Cut costs and boost efficiency  with Moralis APIs We've specifically engineered our APIs for building crypto wallets,  minimizing the number of API calls needed. ![Moralis-Bar](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Moralis-Bar-5.svg)👑![Alchemy-Bar](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Alchemy-Bar.svg)![Quicknode-Bar](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Quicknode-Bar.svg) ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Homepage-Chart-1.svg) Number of API calls needed to build a portfolio view of vitalik's tokens ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/Metamask-Logo-White.svg) ### MONTHLY ACTIVE USERS 0M+ “Moralis’s NFT API lets us focus on our user experience without worrying about scaling to millions of users for the new Portfolio dapp.” ![Picture of Kai Huang](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/01/Kai-metamask-quote-300x300.jpg) Kai Huang Metamask Product Manager Our focus is on game creation and building the best metaverse possible, so we need to work with the best blockchain technology tool, and that's why we chose Moralis. Thanks to Moralis we actually cut our development time by 60% to 70%. Benjelloun OussamaCEO, Orbofi ![](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/feebackOrbofi2.svg) ### Saved between 60% to 70% of development time. Data Powering the worlds biggest crypto products - ![Trust Wallet Logo](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/trust-logo-ffffff.svg)Trust Wallet - ![CryptIO Logo](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/CryptIO-Logo.svg)CryptIO - [![Wirex Logo](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/Wirex-Logo.svg)Wirex](https://moralis.com/case-studies/wirex/ "Wirex Case Study") - ![Opera Logo](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Opera-Logo-Rebrand-White.svg)Opera - ![Aave Logo](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/aave-logo-ffffff.svg)Aave - ![Gate Logo](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/gate-logo-ffffff.svg)Gate - ![Copper Logo](https://moralis.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/copper-logo-ffffff.svg)Copper ## Build Without a Blockchain API Pricing Plan [Start for FREE](https://admin.moralis.com/register) [Contact Sales](https://moralis.com/pricing/#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dpopup%3Aopen%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6IjEzNDM2NyIsInRvZ2dsZSI6ZmFsc2V9) Already have an account? For a detailed explanation of Compute Units (CUs) and how they work, check out our [Compute Units section](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/pricing).

* * *

## [​](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/pricing\#universal-api-compute-units)  Universal API Compute Units

These endpoints support both EVM and Solana chains.

### [​](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/pricing\#token-discovery-&-analytics)  Token Discovery & Analytics

| [searchTokens](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/universal/token/search/token-search) | 150 |

web.title: Pricing
web.description: All Moralis plans come with generous monthly request limits. The number of included requests depends on your plan - check the pricing page for details.
web.markdown:
[Skip to main content](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/pricing#content-area)

[Moralis home page![light logo](https://mintcdn.com/moralis/GWFD1O4mIZzaStPO/logo/light.png?fit=max&auto=format&n=GWFD1O4mIZzaStPO&q=85&s=66e6da0d81943c4679e0ba921850201d)![dark logo](https://mintcdn.com/moralis/GWFD1O4mIZzaStPO/logo/dark.png?fit=max&auto=format&n=GWFD1O4mIZzaStPO&q=85&s=39f72ccb7cd088ee041f49d8b76acc8c)](https://docs.moralis.com/)

Search...

Ctrl KAsk AI

Search...

Navigation

Pricing & Resources

Pricing

[Get Started](https://docs.moralis.com/) [Data API](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/overview) [Streams](https://docs.moralis.com/streams/overview) [Datashare](https://docs.moralis.com/datashare/overview) [Data Indexer](https://docs.moralis.com/data-indexer/overview) [RPC Nodes](https://docs.moralis.com/rpc-nodes/overview) [Auth API](https://docs.moralis.com/auth-api/overview) [Changelog](https://docs.moralis.com/changelog)

On this page

- [What is a Compute Unit?](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/pricing#what-is-a-compute-unit)
- [CU Cost](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/pricing#cu-cost)
- [Dynamic Endpoints](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/pricing#dynamic-endpoints)
- [CU Throughput (CU/s)](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/pricing#cu-throughput-cu%2Fs)

All Moralis plans come with generous monthly request limits. The number of included requests depends on your plan - check the [pricing page](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/pricing#) for details.Moralis uses **Compute Units (CUs)** as a standard way to measure and bill for usage across all products - including [Data API](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/overview), [Streams](https://docs.moralis.com/streams/overview), [Datashare](https://docs.moralis.com/datashare/overview), and [RPC Nodes](https://docs.moralis.com/rpc-nodes/overview).CUs provide a unified way to account for **computational complexity** and **rate limits**, regardless of the product you’re using.

## [​](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/pricing\#what-is-a-compute-unit)  What is a Compute Unit?

A **Compute Unit (CU)** represents the relative computational cost of a request, task, or operation within the Moralis platform. Simple operations consume fewer CUs, while more complex or resource-intensive ones consume more.For example:

- A basic wallet balance check may consume a small number of CUs.
- A multi-chain portfolio aggregation, or a high-frequency stream of on-chain events, may consume significantly more.

CUs ensure you’re only billed for the resources you actually use - and that high-load workloads are fairly metered across the system.

## [​](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/pricing\#cu-cost)  CU Cost

Each product applies CU-based billing differently. Generally:

- **CUs are deducted from your plan’s included quota**.
- **Usage beyond your quota may incur overage charges**, depending on your plan and product.

Visit the individual pricing pages to see how CUs apply to each product:

- [Data API Pricing](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/pricing)
- [Streams Pricing](https://docs.moralis.com/streams/pricing)
- [Datashare Pricing](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/pricing#)
- [Nodes Pricing](https://docs.moralis.com/rpc-nodes/pricing)

## [​](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/pricing\#dynamic-endpoints)  Dynamic Endpoints

Some API endpoints have **dynamic CU costs** that scale based on the scope of the request. Instead of a fixed cost per call, these endpoints charge a base CU amount multiplied by a variable factor such as the number of chains, wallets, or addresses involved.For example:

- An endpoint costing **50 CUs per chain** that queries 3 chains will consume **150 CUs** total.
- An endpoint costing **250 CUs per chain** that queries 5 chains will consume **1,250 CUs** total.

Dynamic endpoints are clearly marked on their respective documentation pages. You can find CU costs for all endpoints on the individual product pricing pages listed above.

## [​](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/pricing\#cu-throughput-cu/s)  CU Throughput (CU/s)

CUs are also used to enforce **rate limits**, measured in **CUs per second (CU/s)**.This helps manage request throughput and protect system performance - allowing heavier requests to be made less frequently, while lightweight calls remain fast and responsive.Different products may enforce CU/s limits differently. Check the respective documentation for details.

[Quickstart Guides](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/quickstart-guides) [Supported Chains](https://docs.moralis.com/get-started/supported-chains)

Ctrl+I

Assistant

Responses are generated using AI and may contain mistakes.

web.title: Available Moralis plans
web.description: Starter Plan (FREE) - For developers that are just getting started with blockchain ​ This includes free access to: ​ - Moralis APIs - Web3 Authentication
web.markdown:
[Skip to main content](https://api-help.moralis.io/en/articles/19153-available-moralis-plans#main-content)

# Available Moralis plans

![](https://static.intercomassets.eu/avatars/50006295/square_128/TEXN16TFV-U02JRBP0UHW-31a93f6f4eb0-512-1666780763.jpg)

Written by Mauro Fabijanic
Updated over 11 months ago

_Note - Applies to Moralis Web3 (API) only_

We offer three different plans for Moralis Web3:

- **[Starter Plan (FREE)](https://admin.moralis.io/register)**\- For developers that are just getting started with blockchain

​

This includes free access to:

​

\- Moralis APIs

\- Web3 Authentication

\- Transaction & Event Monitoring

\- Community Support

\- Online tutorials


- **[Pro Plan](https://api-help.moralis.io/en/articles/19158-upgrade-your-plan-increase-rate-limits)**\- For professionals working in blockchain and crypto.

This includes everything in Starter, plus:

​

\- No daily limit

\- More Requests

\- Higher Rate Limit

\- Request Auto Scaling


​

- **[Business Plan](https://api-help.moralis.io/en/articles/19158-upgrade-your-plan-increase-rate-limits)**\- For Business operating in blockchain and crypto.

This includes everything in Pro, plus:

​

\- Higher rate limit

\- More Requests

- **Access to Premium Endpoints**

​

- **[Enterprise](mailto:success@moralis.io)** \- Specific custom-made solution for your team.

This includes everything in Business, plus:

​

\- Fully Customized Limits as per your project needs

\- SLAs

\- Premium 24/7 Support Channels


#### Feel free to visit our [pricing page](https://developers.moralis.com/pricing/) for more details about our available plans.

* * *

Related Articles

[Getting started with Moralis API](https://api-help.moralis.io/en/articles/19140-getting-started-with-moralis-api) [Support offered by Moralis](https://api-help.moralis.io/en/articles/19142-support-offered-by-moralis) [Create a Moralis account](https://api-help.moralis.io/en/articles/19152-create-a-moralis-account) [Is Moralis a free service?](https://api-help.moralis.io/en/articles/19164-is-moralis-a-free-service) [Does Moralis accept crypto payments?](https://api-help.moralis.io/en/articles/81225-does-moralis-accept-crypto-payments)

Did this answer your question?

😞😐😃

## API Rate Limits

Rate limits are measured in RPS (requests per second). For higher limits, [contact us](https://build.zapper.xyz/contact).

| API Endpoint | Pay As You Go | Startup | Growth | Enterprise |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Tokens | 2 RPS | 10 RPS | 100 RPS | 1000+ |
| NFT Metadata | 2 RPS | 10 RPS | 100 RPS | 1000+ |
| Search | 2 RPS | 5 RPS | 10 RPS | Custom |
| Portfolio Balances | 2 RPS | 3 RPS | 5 RPS | Custom |
| Transaction History | 2 RPS | 3 RPS | 5 RPS | Custom |
| Rankings | 0.1 RPS | 0.5 RPS | 1 RPS | Custom |
| All other endpoints | 10 RPS | 15 RPS | 20 RPS | Custom |

## Query Pricing

All queries have a cost of 3 credits, unless specified otherwise. Multi-address queries have a cost of (Query Base Price) x (Number of Addresses).

Queries listed below have a higher cost due to higher computational requirements.

| Cost | Endpoints |
| --- | --- |
| 8Credits per Query | [latestSwaps](https://build.zapper.xyz/docs/api/endpoints/onchain-prices#example-use-case-latest-swaps) [latestFarcasterSwaps](https://build.zapper.xyz/docs/api/endpoints/farcaster/farcaster-swaps#example-use-case-swaps-by-farcaster-accounts) [latestRelevantFarcasterSwaps](https://build.zapper.xyz/docs/api/endpoints/farcaster/farcaster-swaps) |
| 12Credits per Query | [generalSwapFeed](https://build.zapper.xyz/docs/api/endpoints/farcaster/general-swap-feed) [tokenActivityFeed](https://build.zapper.xyz/docs/api/endpoints/farcaster/token-activity-feed) [tokenRanking](https://build.zapper.xyz/docs/api/endpoints/rankings/token-rankings) [nftRanking](https://build.zapper.xyz/docs/api/endpoints/rankings/nft-rankings) [farcasterHolders](https://build.zapper.xyz/docs/api/endpoints/farcaster/token-holders#farcasterholders) [followedFarcasterHolders](https://build.zapper.xyz/docs/api/endpoints/farcaster/token-holders#followedfarcasterholders) |
| 3Credits per Query | All Others |
